title: The Fiend Who Walked the West
original_title: The Fiend Who Walked the West
overview: A convicted bank robber, serving his sentence and yearning for freedom, becomes entangled with a psychotic, homicidal inmate. This inmate turns on him, terrorizing his wife and murdering his friends.
